channel.title: Planetterrian Daily
channel.description: Daily science, longevity, and health discoveries. A tribe of forward-thinking innovators passionate about the planet, intertwining technology and compassion.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: Daily science, longevity, and health discoveries. A tribe of forward-thinking innovators passionate about the planet, intertwining technology and compassion.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily - Episode 33 - February 23, 2026
item.description:
# Planetterrian Daily **Date:** February 23, 2026 🌍 **Planetterrian Daily** - Science, Longevity & Health Discoveries
**Quick scan:** Breakthroughs in health and cosmic wonders shape a brighter future. If you only read 3 today: #1, #3, #8.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Science & Health Discoveries 1. **Blood Test Predicts Alzheimer’s Onset: 23 February 2026 • Science Daily** A new blood test measuring p-tau217 protein can forecast Alzheimer’s symptoms within 3-4 years. This could revoluti...

item.description:

**Quick scan:** Breakthroughs in AI, batteries, and health redefine sustainable innovation. If you only read 3 today: #2, #3, #8.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Science & Health Discoveries 1. **Microbe Genome Pushes Life’s Limits: 19 February 2026 • New Scientist** A symbiotic microbe inside insect cells has the smallest genome ever recorded, evolved over millions of years...

item.title: Planetterrian Daily - Episode 30 - February 17, 2026
item.description:
# Planetterrian Daily **Date:** February 17, 2026 🌍 **Planetterrian Daily** - Science, Longevity & Health Discoveries
**Quick scan:** Uncovering breakthroughs in brain health, cancer detection, and sustainable health practices. If you only read 3 today: #1, #3, #8.
